_comment: Source-of-truth manifest for LCA Engineer background databases hosted on the McGill OneDrive/SharePoint share (BREE 505 research folder). Edit 'remote_base' if your rclone remote or folder path differs. Each item is fetched with rclone into data/raw/<target>. Version-pin everything for reproducible research.

items.name: agribalyse-3.2
items.note: openLCA database backup. Cannot be parsed directly — open in openLCA, then export to JSON-LD or read via IPC.

items.name: ecoinvent-3.11-cutoff-unit
items.note: Default system model, UNIT processes (traceable). Confirm exact filename with 'fetch_data.py --list-remote'. If JSON-LD zip, read directly; if EcoSpold2, import to openLCA first.

items.name: ecoinvent-3.12-lcia-methods
items.note: openLCA-ready LCIA method pack (ReCiPe/EF/etc). Complements the spreadsheet CFs already on disk.

items.name: agrifootprint-6.3-mass
items.note: Bonus agri-food LCI database (mass allocation). Optional cross-check / alternative to Agribalyse.

items.name: exiobase-3.9.4
items.note: Environmentally-extended MRIO for hybrid LCA / data-gap filling. Large — fetch only when needed.

items.name: openlca-databases-doc
items.note: Import instructions from the course — read this first.
